name: New Relic MCP Server
description: MCP server enabling AI agents to query observability data, access alerting info, analyze performance metrics, and retrieve incident details from New Relic. Provides standardized protocol for agents to integrate New Relic insights into autonomous workflows.
capabilities: Query observability data in natural language
Retrieve deployment and change tracking data
notes: Open-source MCP server released to enable seamless agentic integrations for observability. Allows agents to autonomously gather and analyze operational data for incident response, alerting, and performance optimization.
